CustomField.formula: IF( ISPICKVAL(Onboarding_Attempt_Status_New__c , "Closed") || ISPICKVAL(Onboarding_Attempt_Status_New__c , "Canceled"), Related_Payer_Account_Stamp__r.Name, IF(NOT(ISBLANK( Related_Payer_Account_Stamp__r.Name )), Related_Payer_Account_Stamp__r.Name, Combined_Funnel__r.Account__r.Name ) )
CustomField.label: Related Payer Account
